title: pteris esquirolii var. esquirolii
intro: Pteris esquirolii var. esquirolii, also known as the Esquirol's fern, is a rare species of fern that belongs to the Pteris genus. Traditionally, the plant is used in Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Pteris esquirolii var. esquirolii include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is typically prepared for medicinal use through decoction, in which the dried fronds are boiled in water to create a tea or infusion.
